All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Database
A class to manage database connections.
Employee
 
Inventory
Constructor for Inventory.
InventoryDAO
Data Access Object for inventory management.
Main
Main class for the manager application.
MenuRow
Represents a single row in the menu table, containing the menu item ID, name, price, and ingredients.
ReportRow
 
XReportDAO
Data Access Object for generating X-reports.
XReportRow
Represents a single row in the X Report, containing the hour, quantity sold, and subtotal for that hour.
XReportService
Service class for generating X-reports.
ZReport
Represents the Z Report, containing the total quantity sold and total sales.
